title: Bone dry in creek crossings
review_text: Ran through 3 creek crossings and my feet were completely dry. Same great grip as the non-GTX version. Worth the extra cost if you run in wet conditions.

title: Too warm for summer
review_text: GORE-TEX keeps water out but also keeps heat in. I only use these from October through April. In summer I switch to the regular Grip 5. Great shoe for the right season.
